Environmental Role: Higher wind disperses pollutants; low wind days see AQI buildup. Negative SHAP effect.
Cold temperature → thermal inversions → traps pollutants near surface. Strongest meteo predictor (r=−0.90).
High pressure → stagnant air mass → pollutant accumulation. Positive SHAP in winter.
High humidity → hygroscopic PM2.5 growth + fog formation → AQI amplification.
